544 ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication): Anticoagulant (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking medication from the anticoagulant class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No
